summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Lumina Asset Suite. All backend APIs (20/20) and frontend user stories passed successfully. The application is fully functional with proper auth flows, UI elements, and routing.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/signup creates user and returns tokens
Backend: POST /api/auth/login validates credentials and returns tokens
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user info with valid token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for wrong password
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without token
Backend: POST /api/assets/upload-url returns presigned URL for video
Backend: POST /api/assets creates asset record
Backend: GET /api/assets returns user's assets with RLS enforced
Backend: PATCH /api/assets/{id} updates asset metadata
Backend: DELETE /api/assets/{id} removes asset
Backend: POST /api/queue adds item to queue
Backend: GET /api/queue returns queue with embedded asset data
Backend: POST /api/queue/reorder reorders queue items
Backend: DELETE /api/queue/{id} removes single queue item
Backend: DELETE /api/queue clears all queue items
Backend: POST /api/history records playback event
Backend: GET /api/history returns history sorted by played_at desc
Backend: DELETE /api/history clears all history
Backend: All protected endpoints require JWT and return 401 without token
Backend: All endpoints enforce user_id filtering (RLS)
Frontend: Protected /app route redirects to /login when not authenticated
Frontend: Login page renders with all form elements (email, password, submit)
Frontend: Login with invalid credentials shows error toast
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to /app
Frontend: Signup page renders with all form elements
Frontend: Signup validates password length (min 6 chars via HTML5)
Frontend: Signup with valid data creates account and redirects to /app
Frontend: MCR App loads successfully after login
Frontend: LIVE indicator shows 'OFF AIR' initially (correct state)
Frontend: STAGING badge visible with orange accent
Frontend: LIVE badge visible with red accent
Frontend: TAKE button (orange) found and disabled when no asset in STAGING
Frontend: CUT button (red outline) found and disabled when no asset in STAGING
Frontend: Library/Queue/History tabs visible in sidebar
Frontend: Transport controls visible (prev/play/pause/stop/next/loop)
Frontend: Timecode display shows 00:00:00 initially
Frontend: Master gain fader visible with dB scale
Frontend: 10-Band EQ panel visible with all bands (31, 62, 125, 250, 500, 1k, 2k, 4k, 8k, 16k Hz)
Frontend: EQ reset button visible
Frontend: Audio Output device selector visible
Frontend: Pop-out Display button visible in topbar
Frontend: Sidebar tabs navigation works (Library/Queue/History)
Frontend: Autoplay toggle visible in Queue tab with data-testid
Frontend: /display route renders External Display page
Frontend: Display page shows 'NO LIVE SIGNAL' when nothing is live
Frontend: Display page HUD overlay visible with brand and controls info
